nasb.text: The second is this, ‘You shall love your neighbor as yourself.’ There is no other commandment greater than these.”

esv.text: The second is this: ‘You shall love your neighbor as yourself.’ There is no other commandment greater than these.”

cnv.text: 其次是：‘要愛人如己。’再沒有別的誡命比這兩條更重要的了。”

ccb.text: 其次就是‘要爱邻如己’。再也没有任何诫命比这两条更重要了。”

csbs.text: “其次就是‘要爱邻如己。’    没有别的诫命比这两条更大的了。”
